name: Kokabuterimon

signature_move.name: Scoop Smash
signature_move.description: Scoops up the opponent and jettisons them with its boastful horn.

description: A small-built but very strong Insect Digimon. It has a large horn and forefeet, and it is feared in its surroundings, but really it hates fighting and has a gentle personality. However, it is considerably strong, and it appears to have lifted a Tortamon in the experiment of a certain research institution. Its Special Moves are scooping up the opponent and jettisoning them with its prided horn ( Scoop Smash ) and lunging from its large forefeet ( Beetle Lariat ).
